emiratesid.ae.biometrics
Class BiometricFacade

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.biometrics.BiometricFacade

public class BiometricFacade
extends java.lang.Object

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved.
This class is the interface for all biometric operations

Since:
1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI

Constructor Summary
BiometricFacade()
          Default constructor
BiometricFacade(PCSCReader reader)
          Initialize BiometricFacade object with a valid PCSCReader object
 
Method Summary
 FTP_Template convertImage(FTP_Image Image, int FormatType)
          Convert the fingerprint Image into an ISO/DINV template
 BIT getFirstBit()
          Retrieves first Biometric Information Template that was read by readBiometricInfoTemplates method
 FTP_Template getFirstTemplate()
          Retrieves first fingerprint template that was read by readFingerprints method
 BIT getSecondBit()
          Retrieves second Biometric Information Template that was read by readBiometricInfoTemplates method
 FTP_Template getSecondTemplate()
          Retrieves second fingerprint template that was read by readFingerprints method
 int match(FTP_Template Tpl1, FTP_Template Tpl2)
          Perform the Match offcard operation, using the provided templates
 int matchOffCard(FTP_Template template)
          Perform the Match offcard operation
 boolean matchOnCard(BIT bit, FTP_Template template)
          Perform Match On Card Operation
 void readBiometricInfoTemplates()
          Read the two Biometric Information Templates stored on card
 int readFingerprints()
          Extracts the two fingerprint templates on the card Use getFirstTemplate and getSecondTemplate methods to get the extracted fingerprints
 void setFirstBit(BIT firstBit)
          Sets first BIT Used internally
 void setFirstTemplate(FTP_Template firstTemplate)
          Sets first fingerprint template Used internally
 void setSecondBit(BIT secondBit)
          Sets second BIT Used internally
 void setSecondTemplate(FTP_Template secondTemplate)
          Sets second fingerprint template Used internally

equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Constructor Detail

BiometricFacade

public BiometricFacade()
Default constructor

BiometricFacade

public BiometricFacade(PCSCReader reader)
Initialize BiometricFacade object with a valid PCSCReader object

Parameters:
reader - an initialized PCSCReader object
Method Detail

readBiometricInfoTemplates

public void readBiometricInfoTemplates()
                                throws MiddlewareException
Read the two Biometric Information Templates stored on card

Throws:
MiddlewareException

convertImage

public FTP_Template convertImage(FTP_Image Image,
                                 int FormatType)
                          throws MiddlewareException,
                                 ImageConversionException
Convert the fingerprint Image into an ISO/DINV template

Parameters:
Image - an FTP_Image object
FormatType - request the type of template, 0 for ISO, 1 for DINV, see FormatType
Returns:
the Template converted
Throws:
MiddlewareException - for any kernel error
ImageConversionException - if the template is NULL,

matchOnCard

public boolean matchOnCard(BIT bit,
                           FTP_Template template)
                    throws MiddlewareException,
                           OnCardMatchingException
Perform Match On Card Operation

Parameters:
bit - the BIT on card to be used in match operation
template - fingerprint template to be used in match operation
Returns:
true if match successful
Throws:
MiddlewareException - for any kernel error
OnCardMatchingException - if the matching is failed

matchOffCard

public int matchOffCard(FTP_Template template)
                 throws MiddlewareException,
                        OffCardMatchingException
Perform the Match offcard operation

Parameters:
template - an FTP_Template
isAuthenticated, - if the access to the ID Applet is already established, usually this parameter is set to false for local SM module, and to true with Remote SM
Returns:
the score of the matching operation
Throws:
MiddlewareException - for any internal error
OffCardMatchingException - if the matching is failed

readFingerprints

public int readFingerprints()
                     throws MiddlewareException
Extracts the two fingerprint templates on the card Use getFirstTemplate and getSecondTemplate methods to get the extracted fingerprints

Returns:
Zero if successful, otherwise if errors occurred
Throws:
MiddlewareException

match

public int match(FTP_Template Tpl1,
                 FTP_Template Tpl2)
          throws MiddlewareException
Perform the Match offcard operation, using the provided templates

Parameters:
Tpl1 - the first fingerprint template to match
Tpl2 - the second fingerprint template to match
Returns:
the score of the match operation
Throws:
MiddlewareException

getFirstBit

public BIT getFirstBit()
Retrieves first Biometric Information Template that was read by readBiometricInfoTemplates method

Returns:
first BIT

getSecondBit

public BIT getSecondBit()
Retrieves second Biometric Information Template that was read by readBiometricInfoTemplates method

Returns:
second BIT

getFirstTemplate

public FTP_Template getFirstTemplate()
Retrieves first fingerprint template that was read by readFingerprints method

Returns:
first fingerprint template

setFirstTemplate

public void setFirstTemplate(FTP_Template firstTemplate)
Sets first fingerprint template Used internally

Parameters:
firstTemplate -

getSecondTemplate

public FTP_Template getSecondTemplate()
Retrieves second fingerprint template that was read by readFingerprints method

Returns:
second fingerprint template

Sets second fingerprint template Used internally

Parameters:
secondTemplate -

firstBit - first BIT
